creator: marc.vanwoerkom@science-factory.com
text:
This is a port of OpenVRML 0.9.0, an VRML97 viewer.

        I believe it is mostly ok, possibly except for 
        the version numbering of the two shared libs

            libvrml97.so.2
            libvrml97gl.so.0

        as FreeBSD uses a different bumping scheme than
        other OSes. 
        Could someone have a look at it and possibly submit it for me?

        Thanks,
        Marc

Fix: Here is the port:
